title: platform work pack fragment export
purpose: D4.6 defines platform work pack fragment export for the agent-driven expert system. Platform evolution — promotion ladder, parallel queue, reuse.
scope: Owns `D4.6` only; siblings under `D4` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §6 — Branch D — Platform evolution plane (parallel queue)](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#6-branch-d-platform-evolution-plane-parallel-queue).
behavior_steps: On L5 pack-fragment export items, a platform worker promotes vetted repo artifacts into `template-packs/` fragments—default skills, pipeline stubs, verify suites, glossary rows—for future company instantiations.
Export requires pack-author authority; missing external pack repo access escalates H2 rather than forking fragments inline in a consumer goal repo.
Fragments receive semver-style version stamps and provenance links to the source promotion id per [D5.3](D5.3-fork-new-catalog-entry-provenance.md).
Before publish, [F1.8](F1.8-pack-verify-goal-verify-suites.md) pack verify suites must pass on the fragment slice.
Consumer goals reference pack version from catalog, not ad-hoc inline forks; failed pack verify or missing provenance leaves the export queue item open at H2.

acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: D4.6 defines platform work pack fragment export for the agent-driven expert system. Platform evolution — promotion ladder, parallel queue, reuse. In practice, the system on l5 pack-fragment export items, a platform worker promotes vetted repo artifacts into `template-packs/` fragments—default skills, pipeline stubs, verify suites, glossary rows—for future company instantiations, then export requires pack-author authority; missing external pack repo access escalates h2 rather than forking fragments inline in a consumer goal repo.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-d 2026-06-28 -->

Pack fragment export is upward promotion: vetted repo artifacts become `template-packs/` fragments new instantiations inherit—default skills, pipeline stubs, verify suites, glossary rows. Export is organizational, not a hotfix to one consumer repo.

Export requires pack-author authority or H2 when external pack repo access is missing. Fragments version semver-style; provenance links to source promotion id ([D5.3](D5.3-fork-new-catalog-entry-provenance.md)). This is the L5 capstone work type paired with [D1.6](D1.6-l5-template-pack-fragment.md); consumer goals should reference pack version, not fork fragments inline. Plane F pack verify suites gate publish.
